title: 04.14.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: April 14, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: 04.14.26 Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for April 3, 2026 through April 9, 2026.

The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memorandum transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering April 3–9, 2026, from three city offices. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The bulk of the attached detail visible in the memo consists of public records requests, predominantly for police department records such as police reports, body worn camera video, background requests, and 911 dispatch logs.
fields.key_stats: Public records requests logged from April 3–5, 2026 alone span at least pages 1–3 of 13, with the majority being Police Department Records requests. Frequent requestors include CRU LexisNexis (multiple requests per day), WCHSA CPS, OPM, and FIREARMSHELP@DPS.STATE.NV.US. Request types include Police Reports, Body Worn Camera Video, Background Requests, 911/Dispatch Calls, Fire Incident/Investigation Reports, and Building Plans/Permits.
